blockingIssues.description: Prior blocker remains unresolved: packages/orchestrator-tui/src/hooks/useOrchestratorStatus.ts still uses raw fetch/fetchFn instead of the required shared OrchestratorClient from @papierklammer/orchestrator-console.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make OrchestratorClient usage an explicit must-pass checklist item for any orchestrator API integration; disallow raw fetch in hooks/components unless the task explicitly permits it.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Original feature tui-agent-sidebar-header-status failed on raw fetch usage and the rerun fix feature fix-tui-panels-focus-scroll left the same blocker unresolved.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a rerun check that compares prior blocking issues to fix-feature scope and flags any unresolved blocker not explicitly addressed before spawning review.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 1 recorded three blockers, but the fix feature scope only targeted focus cycling and sidebar scrolling, leaving the OrchestratorClient blocker open into round 2.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require reviewers to verify skillFeedback.followedProcedure claims against transcript ordering whenever the worker skill mandates tests-first behavior.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both original and fix reviews observed implementation-before-tests ordering while handoff reported followedProcedure=true.

rejectedObservations.observation: Transcript ordering concern repeated across original and fix review reports.
